title: feat: polly v2 — adaptive personality, condensed knowledge, native-speed internals
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: The bee has boundaries
gist.blurb: Polly V2 is here. We swapped her Python internals for Rust so she thinks faster, and gave her a new system prompt so she stops apologizing for everything.
gist.summary: Polly V2 ships with native Rust and C internals for maximum speed, plus a condensed knowledge base that makes her context-aware without the bloat.
gist.impact: Chatting with Polly feels faster and much more natural—she'll match your tone, skip the sycophancy, and point you to the docs instead of dumping massive code blocks in chat.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee getting a hardware/software upgrade. Since it's about Rust internals and a new personality, Polly wearing cool shades, holding a glowing rusty gear (Rust lang metaphor). A retro terminal showing chat bubbles.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the cute bee mascot wearing tiny cool sunglasses, holding a glowing rusty gear. She hovers next to a retro CRT monitor displaying neat, compact chat bubbles. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like A Short Hike. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
